scope: One bounded Prize Pack slice using currently accessible evidence only.

target_slice.label: Accessible Series 5-6 Late Scarlet & Violet Single-Hit Window
target_slice.shared_question: Across currently accessible Prize Pack Series 5 and Series 6 sources, does this late Scarlet & Violet family-only row appear in exactly one corroborated series or in more than one, without depending on blocked official acquisition?

ready_rows.why_blocked: The row still lacks deterministic series corroboration across the supported Prize Pack coverage window.
